title: No convention governs implementation-mechanism choice (in-process vs subprocess)
description: No convention governs implementation-mechanism choices (e.g. in-process composition vs a subprocess pipeline). DEC-0015 (pi-bound composes context in-process via loadContext) was decided in this domain without a governing convention.

evidence.reference: conventions block has no rule covering implementation-mechanism choice

proposed_resolution: To be determined exactly from live codebase.
